news.title: Core inflation hit an annual rate of 3.3% in April, as expected, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
news.detail: The PCE price index for April was expected to show an annual inflation rate of 3.8% for all items and 3.3% for core.

news.title: Oil prices turn lower as U.S.-Iran ceasefire extension awaits Trump approval

news.title: CFTC bid to vacate order against Winklevoss' crypto exchange 'very unusual': ex-agency chief
